enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about marijuana and endurance sports, sharing his personal experience using cannabis (particularly sativa vs. indica) while cycling and training. He argues weed is a performance enhancer for training, helps concentration and body awareness, can boost energy late in rides, and that its stigma is the main barrier to wider athletic use.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Definitely a performance enhancer for training; helps push harder and recover mental focus mid-ride
Sativa is the right choice for training — keeps you awake and focused; indica is for sleep, wrong for exercise
If you train with it you should race with it too, to keep conditions consistent
The stigma is the only reason more athletes don't use it; about 60% of the hate he receives is weed-related
Unlikely to meaningfully increase crashes; stress reduction probably offsets any risk
Smokes so much he barely gets high anymore — just maintains a baseline level
